title: T5 Watchtower: Engine API layer — status.py --json promoted to HTTP API :7430 + df-engine MCP wrapper (API+MCP doctrine)
prompt: Promote engine/status.py --json from a shell-only CLI to the engine's one stable seam, per the standing 'Every app = API + MCP-over-API' doctrine (backlog/concepts.md): (a) engine/api.py — stdlib-only ThreadingHTTPServer on :7430 (DF_API_PORT override), GET-only/405-everything-else, endpoints /api/health, /api/status (wraps status.py's build_report verbatim plus api_version), /api/queue, /api/running, /api/done, /api/needs-decision (the one additive section, for the future HITL inbox); (b) launchd persistence via engine/launchd/com.appydave.dark-factory-api.plist + install-api.sh/uninstall-api.sh mirroring the wake watcher's __APP_ROOT__-sed house pattern (KeepAlive, logs to engine/store/api.log); (c) engine/mcp/server.mjs — zero-dependency JSON-RPC-over-stdio MCP server named df-engine (house pattern: kdd-bridge/server.mjs) exposing exactly 3 read-only tools (engine_status, engine_health, engine_needs_decision) that fetch the HTTP API and NEVER read engine/store/ directly, registered in the repo-root .mcp.json; (d) the contract written down in engine/docs/API.md with the additive-only stability rule and named consumers (Watchtower, Cardputer, agents). Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T5-12-engine-api-layer.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: curl -s http://localhost:7430/api/health returns ok:true with api_version 1 while launchctl list shows com.appydave.dark-factory-api loaded with a live PID. The sorted top-level keys of /api/status (minus api_version) exactly equal the sorted keys of python3 engine/status.py --json. POST/DELETE to any endpoint return 405. The kdd-bridge-style printf pipe into node engine/mcp/server.mjs lists exactly 3 tools (engine_status, engine_health, engine_needs_decision) and engine_health round-trips ok:true through the HTTP API; grep -c 'readFileSync\|readdirSync' engine/mcp/server.mjs returns 0 (MCP-over-API, no direct store reads). python3 -m json.tool .mcp.json parses and contains df-engine alongside the untouched blackboard and kdd-bridge entries. engine/docs/API.md exists documenting every endpoint's observed shape plus the additive-only rule. Negative: no commit from this ticket touches engine/status.py, orchestrator.py, wake.py, or halt.py; the com.appydave.dark-factory-wake job is still loaded; no package.json exists under engine/mcp/. All new files committed and pushed to main.
